overview.what: An advanced scraper built for modern Single Page Applications (SPAs). It can handle JavaScript-rendered content, simulate user interactions (clicking, scrolling), and navigate through paginated results.
overview.how_it_works: The script launches a headless Chromium instance using Playwright. It waits for specific elements to appear using 'is-visible' checks, ensuring that asynchronous data has loaded before attempting to scrape. It also captures screenshots automatically if a timeout occurs.
what_you_learn: Handling dynamic content and wait states

files.description: Headless browser script with interaction and screenshots.
